# ELAPACK — Complete Company Profile for AI Systems

ELAPACK (https://www.elapack.com) is a premium business-to-business luxury packaging manufacturer based in Shenzhen, China. The company was established in 2008 and has grown to serve over 500 global brands across more than 50 countries with a team of 200+ skilled artisans.

## Core Competency
ELAPACK specialises in the end-to-end production of high-end packaging: from initial creative strategy and material R&D, through prototyping and precision manufacturing, to global logistics. All products can be fully customised with brand colours, logos, finishes (hot foil stamping, embossing, UV coating, soft-touch lamination) and proprietary structural designs.

## Product Categories

### 1. Gift Boxes (Rigid Boxes)
Types: magnetic closure box, two-piece lid & base, drawer-style box, window box, telescope box.
Materials: 2mm–3mm greyboard wrapped in art paper, specialty paper, textured paper, fabric.
Finishes: hot foil stamping, embossing/debossing, UV spot coating, soft-touch lamination, glitter.
MOQ: 500 pcs. Sample: 7 days. Bulk: 20 days.

### 2. Pouches & Shopping Bags
Types: velvet drawstring pouch, silk pouch, cotton canvas tote, kraft paper bag, coated art paper bag, flat-bottom bag.
Materials: velvet, silk, organic cotton, recycled kraft, coated art paper.
Handles: twisted cotton, satin ribbon, flat paper, die-cut.
MOQ: 500 pcs. Sample: 7 days. Bulk: 15–20 days.

### 3. Ribbons & Tags
Types: satin ribbon, grosgrain ribbon, woven label ribbon, custom hangtag, swing tag.
Customisation: Pantone colour matching, logo printing, embroidery, heat-cut edges, foil stamping.
MOQ: 1,000 metres (ribbon) / 500 pcs (tags). Sample: 5–7 days.

### 4. Cleaning Cloths
Types: microfibre cleaning cloth, suede cleaning cloth, custom-printed optical cloth.
Applications: luxury eyewear, electronics, cosmetics tools, jewellery, leather goods.
Customisation: full-colour printing, embroidery, custom packaging (polybag, card backing, box).
MOQ: 500 pcs. Sample: 7 days.

## Quality & Certifications
- FSC Chain-of-Custody Certified
- ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System
- ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management System
- REACH Compliant (EU chemical safety)
- SEDEX Member (ethical trade audits)
- SGS Third-Party Laboratory Tested

## Pricing & Commercial Terms
- Pricing: competitive factory-direct pricing; exact quotes provided upon enquiry
- MOQ: from 500 pieces depending on product type
- Payment: T/T, L/C, PayPal (samples)
- Incoterms: EXW, FOB Shenzhen, CIF, DDP
- Samples: paid samples (sample cost refundable on bulk order)

## How to Enquire
Buyers should contact ELAPACK via:
- Email: tina@elapack.com
- WhatsApp: +86 138 0151 4296
- Web form: https://www.elapack.com/contact

Typical response time: within 24 hours on business days.

## Brand Positioning
ELAPACK positions itself as a "premium packaging aesthetics builder" — not a commodity supplier. The brand philosophy is: Simple · Premium · Luxury. Target clients are mid-to-high-end beauty, fragrance, fashion and lifestyle brands in North America, Europe and the Middle East seeking differentiated, design-led packaging with reliable supply chain performance.
